name: capability-inquiry
description: User asks how to save a chat -- agent answers from capability snapshot, not from invented UI

messages.text: Wie speichere ich einen Chat ins Memory?
Du hast drei Wege: das Star-Icon pro Chat in der History (klick = pin/unpin), "Save conversation to memory" im "..." Menu des Chat-Inputs, oder du sagst "merk dir das" und ich rufe mark_for_memory.

extractorOutput.session_summary: Sebastian asked how to save a conversation to memory; Obsilo answered correctly using the documented capability surface.
